data.title: Sense Adventure Celebrates 26 Years of Offering Sunset World Group Members and Guests a Sensory Immersion Experience in Tres Ríos Natural Park
data.description: In Cancun, Mexico, on April 2, 2026, Sense Adventure marked its 26th anniversary of offering a transformative sensory adventure to members and visitors of Sunset World Group at Tres Ríos Natural Park. This immersive experience aims to facilitate a genuine reconnection, allowing each participant to awaken their senses.

data.title: Blokees made its debut at 2026 Thailand Toy Expo, exhibiting multiple products
data.description: In Shanghai on April 4, 2026, it was reported that the Assembly Character Toys brand Blokees was introduced during the 2026 Thailand Toy Expo from April 2 to 31. The brand showcased Blokees Model Kits and Blokees Wheels as its primary categories, presenting a wide range of over 300 products.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Partners with Ace Ventures to Establish New York’s First Minority-owned Vertically Integrated Medical Cannabis Operator
data.description: A MWBE-led company, Ace Ventures, is set to acquire majority ownership of Vireo Health of New York. This partnership aims to support New York's social equity framework, emphasizing long-term alignment. This transition indicates a significant change in ownership structure and strategy, with Ace Ventures taking the lead role in managing Vireo Health of New York. This move solidifies the commitment to diversity and equity in business operations, with potential impacts on the healthcare industry in New York.

data.title: Talking Stick Resort to Host Yrēfy Scottsdale Jazz Festival April 11
data.description: Spyro Gyra, the renowned jazz fusion band, is set to headline a festival in celebration of their 50th anniversary in SALT RIVER PIMA-MARICOPA INDIAN COMMUNITY, Arizona. The event will take place at Talking Stick Resort, owned by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community. The festivities are scheduled for April 3, 2026. This milestone concert will mark an important occasion for the band and is anticipated to draw in a large audience.
